act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Special audit.—(1) The Board may, subject to such limitations and such
content:
94. Special audit.—(1) The Board may, subject to such limitations and such
terms as may be prescribed, appoint an auditor to hold any audit, including a special
audit, of records and accounts of any registered or enlisted person.
(2) The auditor so appointed under sub-section (1) shall, for the purpose of
this section, be treated to be an officer of VAT.
Page 51 10/21/2013
RECOVERY OF ARREAR TAX

sub_sections.text:
The Board may, subject to such limitations and such
terms as may be prescribed, appoint an auditor to hold any audit, including a special
audit, of records and accounts of any registered or enlisted person.

The auditor so appointed under sub-section (1) shall, for the purpose of
this section, be treated to be an officer of VAT.
Page 51 10/21/2013
RECOVERY OF ARREAR TAX
